footer.tagline: A diabetes care companion built by DataSpark Tech LLC — free where it matters, no ads, ever.
footer.rights: MyHealthyGlucose is a personal tracking tool — it is not a medical device and does not diagnose, treat, or replace advice from a qualified healthcare professional.

hero.title: Diabetes care, built around the food you eat.
hero.subtitle: Track glucose, HbA1c, blood pressure, meals and medication — around real, regional food. Free tools, no ads, ever.
